themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "King Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming...". Word-study detail reinforces "מֶ֣לֶךְ: And king - a king".
